THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT, DOOR DASH, INC IS PRESENT- REPRESENTED BY ERIC HOWELL. DEFENDANT STATES TO THE COURT THAT THE MATTER HAS BEEN SETTLED BETWEEN BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
